user.title: Choose a device
user.description: Select one of the discovered devices on your local network, or continue with a manual IP.

manual.title: Discover manually
manual.description: Enter the current IP or hostname of the device if it has not appeared automatically yet.

pair.title: Pair device
pair.description: Enter the temporary pairing code shown by the local setup for {name} ({host}, {platform}).

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the local agent
error.invalid_pairing_code: The pairing code is not valid
error.invalid_response: The agent returned invalid discovery data
error.network_not_allowed: Home Assistant is not allowed by the device firewall or subnet restrictions
error.no_pairing_code: The device has no active pairing code. Open the local configurator and generate one
error.pairing_code_expired: The pairing code has expired. Generate a new one in the local setup

abort.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the local agent
abort.invalid_response: The agent returned invalid discovery data
abort.network_not_allowed: Home Assistant is not allowed by the device firewall or subnet restrictions
abort.no_pairing_code: Device discovered, but it does not have an active pairing code
